## Proctor, evaluate and conduct exams using our examination management system

![]()

Pre-exams

### Pre-Exams

* Create and schedule exams
 
* Utilize integrity tools
 
* Setup evaluation rules
 

![]()

During-Exams

### During Exams

* Conduct exams digitally
 
* Proctor using AI technology
 
* Generate student's credibility reports
 

![]()

Post-exams

### Post-Exams

* Assign answer-sheets to evaluators
 
* Monitor and manage evaluation process
 
* Declare results online
 

* * *

## An integrated examination platform by Mercer | Mettl

![]()

Hero-Image

Mercer | Mettl Examine: An All-In-One Examination Management System to Take Your Exams Online

## A comprehensive suite of online exam management tools

Online exam platform | A suite of proctoring tools | Optimum solution for exam evaluation

### Online examination platform

* Scalable and reliable assessment platform
 
* Supports 26+ question formats
 
* Built-in equation editor for math and chemistry
 
* Automated student scheduling system
 

[](/online-exam-software-system/)

![]()

Online-examination

* * *

### Advanced proctoring to transform examination integrity

* 3-point student authentication
 
* Secure browser to ensure safe exam environment
 
* A suite of AI-based and human-based proctoring tools
 

* AI-based auto proctoring
 
* Live proctoring
 
* 'Industry First' - Proctor the proctor
 

[](/online-remote-proctoring/)

![]()

Proctoring-suite

* * *

### Streamlined exam evaluation and management

* Admin control to assign answer sheets to evaluators
 
* Digital evaluation system to evaluate and re-evaluate answer sheets
 
* Dashboards to track the progress of the evaluation
 
* Dashboards to govern examination drives
 

[](/onscreen-digital-evaluation-system/)

![]()

Exam-evaluation

## Simplifying examination security and evaluation processes

![]()

Holistic-assessment

### Exam governance

* Checks and controls for controllers and evaluators
 
* Live tracking for evaluation and submission
 

![]()

Exam-scalability

### Exam scalability

* The ability to conduct 200,000+ exams in a day
 
* The ability to scale as per client requirements
 

![]()

Easy-ERP-Integration

### Easy ERP integration

* Easy data sharing with your ERP system
 
* API-based integration to ERPs
 

![]()

Proctoring

### Advanced proctoring

* Secure online exams with our AI-assisted proctoring technology
 
* Candidate verification using 3-point authentication
 

![]()

Customisable-solutions

### Customizable solutions

* Support 20+ languages
 
* Custom registration fields
 

![]()

Data-security

### Impeccable data security

* Role-based access control
 
* Concealment of student information before evaluation
